get.summary: Get game statistics for player for a specific period
get statistics training parts for member
Get statistics training parts for team

parameters.name: includeNotSelected
parameters.description: boolean that determines if this call will also return non-selected players from the tournament's team

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date (yyyy-MM-dd) (required if startDate or since is not used

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Updated trainings since (dd-MM-yyyyHH:mm:ss), only applicable in combination with team ids (required if startDate or endDate is not used)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date (yyyy-MM-dd) (required if endDate or since is not used

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Updated trainings until (dd-MM-yyyyHH:mm:ss), only applicable in combination with team ids and since param
